top_signals.title: Aggressive Asia Hikes Show Few Signs of Stabilizing Currencies
top_signals.summary: Asian central banks are turning to ever more aggressive interest-rate hikes to shore up currencies, though there are few signs of success.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Netanyahu orders Israeli forces to take control of 70% of Gaza
top_signals.summary: Prime minister says Israel is ‘squeezing Hamas’ in the enclave at the same time as escalating attacks in southern Lebanon
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Torc Robotics and Mila team up on physical AI for autonomous trucks
top_signals.summary:
Torc Robotics Mila partnership advances physical AI for autonomous trucking. Torc is now Mila's only autonomous trucking company with dedicated research space in Montreal.

The post Torc Robotics and Mila team up on physical AI for autonomous trucks appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Blue Origin rocket explodes on launch pad during testing
top_signals.summary: Failure comes days before planned launch of internet satellites for Amazon
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bit Digital buys $20M worth of Ethereum, expands treasury to 158K ETH
top_signals.summary: The purchase pushed the Nasdaq-listed company ahead of Coinbase Global to become the fourth-largest public corporate holder of Ether, according to CoinGecko data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Prediction markets legal battles heat up in Minnesota, Rhode Island
top_signals.summary: Kalshi sued Minnesota while the CFTC filed against Rhode Island as legal wrangling with state-level authorities seems likely headed to the US Supreme Court.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Commission fines Temu €200 million for breaching the Digital Services Act
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 28 May 2026 Today, the European Commission issued a fine of €200 million to Temu under the Digital Services Act (DSA).
